Why Plus36 Academy

Three Pillars of Transformation

We didn't build another course marketplace. We built a system designed to actually change your life.

01

Structured for results, not just content

Learn at Rocket Speed

Our courses are engineered with spaced repetition and active recall techniques proven to accelerate skill acquisition by 3x. Every module builds deliberately on the last.

  • Bite-sized lessons (10–20 mins)
  • Hands-on projects & assignments
  • AI-powered learning path
  • Instant feedback & quizzes
02

Rigorously vetted expert instructors

Learn from the Best

Only the top 3% of applicants make it onto our platform. Our experts are practitioners — working professionals who teach what they actually do every day.

  • Industry practitioners only
  • Minimum 5 years experience
  • Ongoing quality reviews
  • 1-on-1 Q&A sessions
03

Recognized by 500+ employers

Credentials That Open Doors

We've partnered with leading tech companies and enterprises across Africa who actively recruit from Plus36 graduates. Your certificate signals verified competence.

  • Verifiable digital certificates
  • LinkedIn-ready credentials
  • Employer partner network
  • Lifetime certificate access
247 students enrolled in the last 24 hours

Don't let another month pass by. The skills that define the next decade are being mastered right now.

Claim Your Free Spot
Real Results

from 3,247 verified reviews

Software Engineer @ Flutterwave
₦4.5M salary

👩🏽‍🎨

Freelance UX Designer
3× income

"The UI/UX course gave me the portfolio and confidence to charge premium rates. I now earn 3x what I made at my 9-5. The instructor feedback was incredibly detailed and practical."

🧑🏾‍💼

Digital Marketing Lead @ Cowrywise
ROI in 1 week

"What sets Plus36 apart is the quality of instructors. These are people actually doing the work, not just teaching theory. The digital marketing course paid for itself in the first week."

👩🏿‍🔬
Aisha Musa
Data Analyst @ MTN Nigeria

"The data science curriculum is on par with Coursera and Udemy, but with African context built in. The case studies used real Nigerian business problems — so much more relevant."

FAQ

Questions? We've Got You.

Still not sure? Chat with us live — we respond in under 10 minutes.

Not at all! We have courses for absolute beginners through to advanced practitioners. Every course clearly states its prerequisites, and most of our most popular courses assume zero prior knowledge. You just need curiosity and commitment.

Zero Risk. Maximum Reward.

Try any course free for 7 days. If it doesn't blow your expectations, get a full refund. No fine print. No hassle.
